4 Assam Cricketers Suspended Over Corruption Allegations

Dec 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

4 Assam Cricketers Suspended Over Corruption Allegations

Four Assam cricketers—Amit Sinha, Ishan Ahmed, Aman Tripathi, and Abhishek Thakuri—have been suspended by the Assam Cricket Association (ACA) following allegations of involvement in corrupt practices during the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2025.

The suspension comes amid accusations that the players attempted to influence and instigate teammates, raising serious concerns about the integrity of the sport.

Key Points

  • Cricketers suspended: Amit Sinha, Ishan Ahmed, Aman Tripathi, Abhishek Thakuri
  • Suspension issued by Assam Cricket Association (ACA)
  • Alleged involvement in corrupt practices during Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2025
  • Accusations include attempting to manipulate teammates
  • Measures reflect strict action to protect the integrity of cricket in Assam

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 4 Assam Cricketers Suspended Over Corruption Allegations
